sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: A Look at Thomson Reuters Corp (TRI) After 5.0% Gain -- GF Value $179.84 vs Price $87.43
feed.summary: Thomson Reuters Corp (TRI) saw a 5.0% share price increase, reaching $87.43, yet it remains significantly undervalued according to GuruFocus' GF Value™ of $179.84. With a GF Score™ of 76/100, indicating strong profitability and growth but weak valuation and momentum, TRI presents a potential investment opportunity with a substantial margin of safety. No insider transactions have been reported in the last three months, suggesting a neutral stance from company insiders.

feed.title: J.P. Morgan Maintains Steel Dynamics(STLD.US) With Hold Rating, Raises Target Price to $205
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan has reiterated its Hold rating on Steel Dynamics (STLD.US) and increased its target price for the stock to $205. This adjustment reflects the analyst's continued assessment of the company's performance and market position, leading to an updated valuation.

feed.title: Perpetual Ltd Sells 55,135 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Perpetual Ltd reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 15.1% in the fourth quarter, selling 55,135 shares and leaving them with 310,458 shares valued at $97.17 million. This divestment comes as other institutional investors, such as Berkshire Hathaway Inc. and Capital World Investors, have significantly increased their holdings in Alphabet. The article also provides analyst ratings, insider trading details, and reports on Alphabet's recent financial performance and the company's strategic moves in the AI sector.

feed.title: Freestone Capital Holdings LLC Purchases 33,691 Shares of Johnson Controls International plc $JCI
feed.summary: Freestone Capital Holdings LLC significantly increased its stake in Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) by 983.4% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 33,691 shares to hold a total of 37,117 shares valued at $4.445 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in JCI, with Federated Hermes Inc. raising its position by 120.7%. The article also notes that numerous analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for JCI, with an average price target of $137.15, and highlights recent insider trading activity.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Sells 164,020 Shares of Expro Group Holdings N.V. $XPRO
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. significantly reduced its stake in Expro Group Holdings N.V. by selling 164,020 shares in Q3, now holding 42,730 shares valued at $508,000. This comes as Expro Group reported mixed quarterly results, with EPS meeting estimates but revenue missing forecasts and declining year-over-year. Analysts have a consensus "Hold" rating for Expro Group, with an average target price of $15.25 compared to its current trading price near $17.08.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Lowers Position in Root, Inc. $ROOT
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. significantly reduced its stake in Root, Inc. by 79.4% in the third quarter, selling 22,952 shares and holding 5,953 shares valued at approximately $533,000. Conversely, Bank of America increased its position by 185.2%. Despite Root beating quarterly earnings expectations with an EPS of $0.31 against an estimated $0.03 and revenues of $397 million (up 21.5% YoY), analysts maintain a cautious "Hold" rating, with some price targets cut to $52 and an expected fiscal year EPS of -$0.08.

feed.title: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL Has $1.17 Million Stock Holdings in Fortive Corporation $FTV
feed.summary: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL significantly reduced its stake in Fortive Corporation (NYSE:FTV) by 96.2% in the third quarter, now holding 23,779 shares valued at $1.17 million. Despite this, other hedge funds increased their positions in FTV, and institutional investors collectively own 94.94% of the stock. Fortive recently exceeded Q3 earnings expectations, reporting EPS of $0.90 against an $0.83 estimate, and analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with a consensus target price of $60.17.

feed.title: Freestone Capital Holdings LLC Has $8.80 Million Holdings in Southern Company (The) $SO
feed.summary: Freestone Capital Holdings LLC increased its stake in Southern Company (NYSE:SO) by 28.8% in the fourth quarter, bringing their total holdings to $8.80 million. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Southern, with 64.10% of the stock owned by institutional investors and hedge funds. Southern Company recently announced a quarterly dividend and reported its latest earnings, missing analyst consensus estimates for EPS but exceeding revenue expectations.

feed.title: The Travelers Companies, Inc. stock (US89417E1091): Why property-casualty resilience now defines investor appeal?
feed.summary: This report analyzes The Travelers Companies, Inc. (TRV) stock, highlighting its resilience in the property-casualty (P&C) insurance sector amidst rising catastrophes and hardening rates. It details Travelers' disciplined underwriting, U.S. market dominance, and diversified business model as key factors for stable returns and investor appeal, particularly for income-focused and defensive portfolios. The article also covers analyst perspectives, potential risks, and future catalysts for investors.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy Inc. stock (US15189T1079): Is regulatory pressure now the real test for steady returns?
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy Inc. (US15189T1079) operates as a regulated utility, delivering electricity and natural gas to millions in Texas and the Midwest, positioning it as a defensive play for investors. The article explores how infrastructure investments to harden grids against extreme weather and support growing demand are critical, but also subject to regulatory approval and public scrutiny over rate hikes. While its consistent dividend history appeals to income-focused investors, the company faces significant risks from regulatory pressure, weather extremes, interest rate sensitivity, and project execution challenges.

feed.title: Galvin Gaustad & Stein LLC Trims Stake in EOG Resources
feed.summary: Galvin Gaustad & Stein LLC, a financial management firm, reduced its stake in EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE: EOG) by 13.2% during the fourth quarter of 2025. This transaction involved selling 19,148 shares, leaving the firm with 125,629 shares valued at $13.2 million. The reduction signals an adjustment in the hedge fund's investment strategy and offers insight into broader market trends within the oil and gas sector.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corporation stock (US30231G1022): Is energy transition strategy strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (US30231G1022) is at a critical juncture, balancing its traditional oil and gas operations with increasing pressure for energy transition. The company's integrated model and focus on high-return projects like the Permian and Guyana are key to its strategy, aiming for 4-5% annual production growth through 2030, alongside low-carbon investments. For investors, the challenge lies in assessing if this dual approach can unlock new upside while navigating global energy demands, geopolitical volatility, and policy shifts.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines scales back sustainable fuel and net-zero targets, Bloomberg News Reports
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines has reportedly scaled back two key environmental targets. The airline removed its pledge to use 10% sustainable aviation fuel by 2030 and rephrased its net-zero emissions goal for 2050 as an "aspiration" rather than a "goal." This move comes as the industry faces challenges with the high cost and slow development of sustainable aviation fuel and supply chain issues impacting new aircraft.

feed.title: Did Third Point’s Exit Shift CoStar Group’s (CSGP) Margin Story or Simply Clarify It?
feed.summary: Activist hedge fund Third Point recently exited its position in CoStar Group (CSGP) and dropped its proxy fight plans, despite previous criticism of management and profitability. CoStar, meanwhile, continues to focus on margin expansion, profitable growth, and emphasizes its commitment to board diversity, leveraging its strong information services in the real estate market. This article explores how Third Point’s departure might influence CoStar’s investment outlook, especially concerning its efforts to boost profitability through investments in platforms like Homes.com and improved U.S. office leasing data.

feed.title: Philip Morris Ferrari Hypersail Tie Up Meets Valuation Discount Debate
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (NYSE:PM) has announced a new partnership with Ferrari Hypersail, extending its long-standing relationship with Ferrari into ocean racing with a focus on technology and sustainability. This move aligns with PMI's push into smoke-free products and aims to broaden the brand's positioning beyond traditional cigarettes, potentially influencing perceptions among customers, regulators, and partners regarding its long-term direction, particularly in sustainability. Despite this positive development and a valuation suggesting PM shares are trading about 20% below estimated fair value, the stock has shown weak short-term momentum with a 6.8% decline over the last 30 days.

feed.title: McDonald's Expands Beverage Menu To Target Younger Guests And Check Growth
feed.summary: McDonald's is launching a new line of energy drinks, specialty sodas, and crafted cold beverages across the U.S. to attract younger, budget-conscious customers, increase traffic, and boost average check size. This expansion positions McDonald's in direct competition with coffee and beverage chains, and while it offers potential for higher-margin sales and customer engagement, investors should consider execution risks and competitive responses. The success of this move will depend on customer adoption and integration into existing operations.

feed.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated stock (US7475251036): Is AI infrastructure demand strong enough to unlock sust
feed.summary: QUALCOMM Inc. is positioned as a key player in the semiconductor market, benefiting from the surging demand for AI infrastructure. The company's dual revenue stream from semiconductor sales and intellectual property licensing, alongside its strategic focus on diversified applications like 5G, automotive, and edge AI, provides resilience and growth opportunities. While facing competition from industry giants, QUALCOMM's competitive edge in power-efficient designs and modem leadership, coupled with favorable analyst views and strategic partnerships, suggests potential for sustained upside despite geopolitical and competitive risks.

feed.title: Harbor Island Capital LLC Has $34.40 Million Stock Position in Lam Research Corporation $LRCX
feed.summary: Harbor Island Capital LLC reduced its stake in Lam Research Corporation by 12.9% in Q4, but it still represents their largest holding at $34.40 million. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $246.94, yet several insiders sold significant shares last quarter. Lam Research reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and has a market capitalization of $333.76 billion.

feed.title: Cura Wealth Advisors LLC Has $34.74 Million Holdings in FS KKR Capital Corp. $FSK

An insider transaction shows Daniel Pietrzak increasing his holdings, while institutional investors collectively own 36.26% of the company.

feed.title: Freestone Capital Holdings LLC Has $14.19 Million Holdings in Union Pacific Corporation $UNP

feed.title: Cura Wealth Advisors LLC Makes New $1 Million Investment in Duke Energy Corporation $DUK
feed.summary: Cura Wealth Advisors LLC has reportedly invested over $1 million in Duke Energy Corporation, acquiring 8,545 shares during the fourth quarter. This comes as Duke Energy exceeded Q4 earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $1.50 against an expected $1.49, and revenue of $7.94 billion. Despite insider selling by SVP Regis T. Repko and CEO Louis E. Renjel, analysts generally rate the stock as a "Hold" with an average target price of $139.33.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. stock (US0079031078): Is AI chip dominance strong enough to unlock new
feed.summary: This article examines whether Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) can unlock new upside through its AI chip dominance. It highlights AMD's strategic shift toward AI and data center segments, contrasting its open ecosystem approach with Nvidia's CUDA dominance. The piece also discusses AMD's competitive landscape, risks, and its appeal to U.S. and global English-speaking investors, emphasizing its role in the booming AI market.

feed.title: Cove Private Wealth LLC Acquires New Shares in GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: Cove Private Wealth LLC has acquired 1,487 shares of GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) worth $972,000 in Q4. GE Vernova reported strong quarterly earnings with an EPS of $13.39 and revenue of $10.96 billion, exceeding expectations. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share, and analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $889.30.

feed.title: RTX's Collins Aerospace and Air Canada unveil Aurora suites and economy seats across the carrier's A321XLR fleet
feed.summary: Collins Aerospace, an RTX business, and Air Canada have partnered to furnish Air Canada's new fleet of Airbus A321XLR aircraft with custom seating solutions. The new design includes 14 premium Aurora business class suites and 168 Meridian+ main cabin seats, aiming to provide a widebody experience on single-aisle aircraft. The first of 30 Air Canada A321XLRs is expected to enter service this spring, showcasing these new cabin interiors.

feed.title: NRG Energy Inc. stock (US6293775085): Is clean energy expansion now the real growth lever?
feed.summary: NRG Energy Inc. is strategically pivoting towards clean energy and data centers to capitalize on the surging U.S. power demand driven by AI and electrification. The company aims for net-zero emissions by 2050 and to grow renewables to 20% of its capacity by 2030, positioning it for significant growth, especially in the Texas market. While challenges like commodity price volatility and regulatory shifts exist, NRG's diverse portfolio, retail customer base, and focus on reliable clean energy offer a strong investment case for domestic and global English-speaking investors.

feed.title: CoStar Group Brings Matterport To Domain
feed.summary: CoStar Group is rolling out Matterport technology for its residential portal, Domain, in Australia. This initiative includes a team of drone pilots and photographers to provide advanced property presentation features like interactive floor plans, drone-captured exteriors, and 4K photography, available at no extra cost to vendors using Domain's most popular marketing package. The program leverages CoStar's existing blueprint from the United States, aiming to create a new standard for property marketing in Australia and enhance the consumer experience.

feed.title: IDEX Corporation (NYSE:IEX) Receives Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Brokerages
feed.summary: IDEX Corporation (NYSE:IEX) has received an average "Moderate Buy" recommendation from various brokerage firms, with three analysts rating it a "hold" and six a "buy." The average 12-month price target is set at $226.80. Several analysts recently increased their price objectives for IDEX, citing positive outlooks and strong financial performance, as the company reported Q4 earnings that topped consensus estimates and revenue growth of 4.2%.

feed.title: Waste Management, Inc. (NYSE:WM) Receives Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: Waste Management, Inc. (NYSE:WM) has received an average rating of "Moderate Buy" from twenty-five analysts, with a consensus twelve-month price target of $254.8182. Recent analyst reports have adjusted price objectives, and the company has seen insider share sales totaling over $4.6 million in the last three months. The company also recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.945 per share.

feed.title: Ford hits a major industry leading mark for the 9th straight year
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. has been recognized as America's number one auto assembler for the ninth consecutive year, having assembled over two million vehicles in the U.S. in 2025. CEO Jim Farley emphasized the company's commitment to American manufacturing and jobs, highlighting that Ford assembled more light-duty vehicles and exported more U.S.-assembled vehicles than any other manufacturer. The company plans significant investments in Kentucky, including a $2 billion expansion at its Louisville Assembly Plant for EV production and the re-opening of the BlueOval SK Battery Park for battery energy storage systems.

feed.title: Chipotle coming to Mashpee's Route 28, across from planned Trader Joe's
feed.summary: A new Chipotle Mexican Grill is under construction in Mashpee's South Cape Village, located on Route 28. This 44-seat fast-casual restaurant will feature custom-made burritos, bowls, and tacos, and is expected to open soon, although an official date has not been announced. The development faces concerns regarding potential traffic impacts, especially with a proposed Trader Joe’s nearby and ongoing residential constructions in Mashpee Commons.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Receives Consensus Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Brokerages
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from 19 brokerages, with an average 1-year price target of $128.47. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced positive regulatory and clinical developments, including Priority Review for ifinatamab deruxtecan and expanded EU approval for KEYTRUDA regimens. Despite these positives, recent insider sales and a slight stock dip suggest some near-term investor caution.

feed.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Eaton, Emerson Electric, Powell Industries and EnerSys
feed.summary: The Zacks Manufacturing - Electronics industry faces challenges like rising input costs and supply-chain disruptions but benefits from strength in the manufacturing sector and increased new orders. Despite a "bleak" near-term outlook with a low Zacks Industry Rank, companies such as Eaton, Emerson Electric, Powell Industries, and EnerSys are well-positioned due to robust demand and company-specific strengths. The industry has outperformed both the broader sector and the S&P 500 over the past year.

feed.title: Brand Marketer of the Month—Eli Lilly CMO on bringing health into cultural moments and challenging obesity stigmas
feed.summary: Eli Lilly's CMO, Lina Polimeni, is focused on integrating health messages into prominent cultural events and combating the stigma associated with obesity. This approach highlights the company's efforts to shift perceptions and increase awareness regarding health issues within a broader societal context.

feed.title: Financial Enhancement Group LLC Takes $1.39 Million Position in The Charles Schwab Corporation $SCHW
feed.summary: Financial Enhancement Group LLC has acquired a new stake of 13,609 shares in The Charles Schwab Corporation, valued at approximately $1.39 million. This move is part of broader institutional interest, with hedge funds and institutional investors owning 84.38% of the stock. Analysts generally rate SCHW as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $114.50, following strong Q4 earnings, positive FY2026 EPS guidance, and an increased quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Galvin Gaustad & Stein LLC Lowers Holdings in Procter & Gamble Company (The) $PG
feed.summary: Galvin Gaustad & Stein LLC reduced its stake in Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) by 11.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 13,113 shares. Despite this reduction and recent analyst target cuts, the consensus rating for PG remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $163.89. The company faces near-term risks from consumer-product probes and significant insider selling, which could impact sentiment.

feed.title: Air India Selects Hughes to Transform In-Flight Connectivity on Airbus and Boeing Aircraft
feed.summary: Air India has selected Hughes Network Systems to provide in-flight connectivity solutions for its Airbus and Boeing fleet, aiming to deliver a consistent Wi-Fi experience. This partnership will leverage Airbus HBC plus for A350-1000s and RAVE Aerospace solution for Boeing 787-8s and 777-300ERs. The goal is to offer home-broadband-like bandwidth and latency on Air India's international and domestic flights, with a roadmap to upgrade to low-latency LEO connectivity.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Earnings: Strong Results Encounter Insatiable Expectations
feed.summary: Morningstar maintains its moderately overvalued assessment for Goldman Sachs, despite the firm reporting strong first-quarter 2026 earnings with significant revenue growth and returns on equity. The increase in the fair value estimate from $700 to $730 is largely due to strong quarterly results and regulatory clarity allowing significant capital deployment. Goldman Sachs is expected to be a long-term winner in the investment banking landscape, though growth may slow in the latter half of 2026.

feed.title: Tesla: Full Self-Driving Approval in Netherlands Should Boost Deliveries
feed.summary: Dutch regulators have approved Tesla's full self-driving (FSD) supervised software for use, with the next step being EU-wide approval, expected later this year. This approval is anticipated to boost Tesla's European sales in the second half of 2026, offsetting projected declines in US deliveries due to the expiration of tax credits. Morningstar maintains its $400 fair value estimate for Tesla, considering the stock fairly valued.

feed.title: Assetmark Inc. Boosts Stake in Qualcomm
feed.summary: Assetmark Inc. has increased its stake in Qualcomm by 1.7% in the fourth quarter of 2025, now owning 656,233 shares valued at approximately $112 million. This move reflects institutional investors' continued confidence in Qualcomm's long-term potential in the wireless technology industry. The company believes in Qualcomm's leading role in the evolving wireless technology landscape.

feed.title: Milan shares edge higher on cautious Middle East optimism; Stellantis rallies
feed.summary: Milan's FTSE Mib index rose by 0.66% on cautious optimism regarding potential de-escalation in the Middle East conflict, despite stalled talks between the US and Iran and a naval blockade. The market saw a rotation from defense and energy stocks to cyclical stocks, with Stellantis rallying and several Italian luxury brands showing resilience. Danieli also saw a significant gain after securing a €450 million contract.

feed.title: Southborough MA Town Meeting OKs Costco liquor license. What's next
feed.summary: Voters at Southborough Town Meeting have approved an alcohol license for a proposed Costco store at 21 Coslin Drive, following a prior approval for a necessary zoning change. The project, led by Framingham-based Atlantic Management Corp., is expected to open in the summer of 2027, pending further site plan and permit applications and state approval of the alcohol license. A traffic study is currently underway, and major site plan and special permit applications are anticipated within the next month or two.

feed.title: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) Receives Average Rating of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) has received an average "Hold" rating from sixteen analysts, with thirteen recommending a hold and three a buy. The average twelve-month price target is $19.50. The company recently reported quarterly EPS of $0.27, exceeding consensus estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2075 per share, representing an annualized yield of 4.8%.

feed.title: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) Receives Consensus Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from twenty analysts, with an average twelve-month target price of $309.6250. The article details recent analyst price target adjustments, insider stock purchases by directors David N. Farr and Michael Miebach, and institutional investor activity. IBM's recent financial performance, including a quarterly earnings beat and a dividend announcement, is also highlighted.

feed.title: T-Mobile US, Inc. stock (US8725901040): Is 5G leadership strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. continues to lead the U.S. wireless market with superior 5G coverage, driving consistent postpaid customer growth and strong financial performance. The company's business model, centered on aggressive 5G investment and value-oriented pricing, has led to significant market share gains and operational efficiencies, making it an attractive prospect for investors in the United States and English-speaking markets worldwide. While risks such as competitive pricing and economic slowdowns exist, analyst consensus remains positive, highlighting T-Mobile's potential for continued growth and capital returns.

feed.title: F5, Inc. (NASDAQ:FFIV) Given Average Rating of "Hold" by Analysts

feed.title: Bio-Techne Corp (NASDAQ:TECH) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Bio-Techne Corp (NASDAQ:TECH) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus recommendation from fourteen brokerages, with an average one-year price target of $72.7692. feed.title: Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. (NASDAQ:EXPD) Given Average Rating of "Reduce" by Brokerages

Recent analyst reports show varied target price adjustments and ratings, while institutional investors have significantly modified their holdings in the transportation company.

feed.title: Pool Corporation $POOL Shares Acquired by Deprince Race & Zollo Inc.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE:CFG) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
